summary: Backend-only Task 6 retest completed. Verified oracle-leak contract hardening and regressions; full suite passed (43/43).
action_items: No blocking fixes required for the reviewed Task 6 scope.
Optional hardening: add a dedicated assertion that final-step AgentFeedback.done is true and intermediate steps are false.
critical_code_review_comments: BaseAgent.observe contract is now agent-facing only via AgentFeedback(correct, reward, done); StepResult is no longer passed into agents.
run_episode() constructs AgentFeedback from environment result and passes only safe fields; no expected_output exposure in agent-facing callback path.
RCSEnvironment observation history now contains step_id/input_symbol/action/correct only, preventing oracle leakage through history.
StaticShiftAgent infers from (input_symbol, action) and updates using feedback.correct; commit threshold remains two consistent confirmations and agent does not revise once committed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed pytest /app/tests -v --tb=short with JUnit output at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. All targeted Task 6 checks are green: no agent-facing oracle leak, updated observe interface, static commit regression behavior, and baseline environment/builder/ruleset/spec tests.
rca of the issue: Previously reported commit-rule bug from iteration_6 is not reproducible after current refactor. Also validated no EXPECTED_OUTPUT leakage in agent-facing feedback/history path. NO MOCKED APIs used.
